headline: Generac’s New SD Generators Test Data Center Growth Story
summary: Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) has introduced new SD1250 and SD1500 diesel generators aimed at heavy industrial and data center workloads. The launch aligns with rising data center order backlog and growing interest from hyperscale operators in Generac's high capacity solutions. The SD1250 and SD1500 are positioned for mission critical use cases where power reliability and efficiency are central priorities. For investors tracking NYSE:GNRC, the new generators come as the stock trades around...
